name: System.Image_U

documentation.description:
Preconditions in this unit are meant for analysis only, not for run-time
checking, so that the expected exceptions are raised. This is enforced by
setting the corresponding assertion policy to Ignore. Postconditions and
contract cases should not be executed at runtime as well, in order not to
slow down the execution of these functions.

constants.name: Unsigned_Width_Ghost
constants.code: Unsigned_Width_Ghost : constant Natural := U_Spec.Max_Log10 + 2 with Ghost;

subprograms.name: Image_Unsigned

documentation.description:
Computes Uns'Image (V) and stores the result in S (1 .. P) setting
the resulting value of P. The caller guarantees that S is long enough to
hold the result, and that S'First is 1.

subprograms.name: Set_Image_Unsigned

documentation.description:
Stores the image of V in S starting at S (P + 1), P is updated to point
to the last character stored. The value stored is identical to the value
of Uns'Image (V) except that no leading space is stored. The caller
guarantees that S is long enough to hold the result. S need not have a
lower bound of 1.

formals.name: U_Spec
formals.code: with package U_Spec is new System.Value_U_Spec (Uns => Uns) with Ghost;
